reuseRequirements: Reuse the existing UI component and screenshot runner.
forbiddenReimplementations: Do not recreate the existing component under a new name.

stageGates.description: Confirm the existing component and runner are reused.
Render and compare the fixed visual state.

rules: Stop when the runner emits ERROR or omits the required screenshot.
Do not change the visual oracle or acceptance criteria.

criteria: Required content is visible without overlap.
No ERROR banner or missing asset is present.
